title: Estate per-repo stats.json (producer contract)
description: Schema for the test-scope facet of the estate stats.json pipeline, hardened 2026-07-07 (red/red_detail + tests.declared). Contract: neckarshore-planning/docs/reference/stats-json-contract.md

audited_sha.description: The repo-SHA the counts were taken on (git rev-parse HEAD).

red.description: true if the run that produced this file was not fully green.

red_detail.description: One line naming the failure when red:true; null when green.

total.description: Executed AND CI-gated AND disjoint = sum(values of byType). Never includes declared or lenses.

byType.description: Distinct executed+gated runner totals, keyed by taxonomy.

declared.description: Executed-but-ungated OR --list-declared counts. Display-only, NEVER summed into total.

lenses.description: Overlapping classification subsets over byType. Display-only, NEVER summed into total.

endpoints.description: Optional API endpoint count carried for the tile facet.
